hero.subtitle: At Rijschool Lovanium, experienced instructors guide you step by step — without stress, with confidence, to your driver's license.

testimonials.name: Sarah Vandenbroeck
testimonials.text: Got my license in just three months! The instructors are patient, clear and really put you at ease. Absolutely recommended for anyone who is nervous.

testimonials.name: Thomas De Smedt
testimonials.text: I was very nervous at first, but after the first lesson I already felt much better. The personal approach really makes the difference. Passed first time!

testimonials.name: Emma Claes
testimonials.text: Excellent value for money. Modern Audi, patient instructor and flexible hours. I would recommend Rijschool Lovanium to everyone.

testimonials.name: Luca Martens
testimonials.text: After two failed attempts at another driving school, I passed here. The guidance is completely different — much calmer and more targeted.

testimonials.name: Julie Peeters
testimonials.text: My instructor was super professional and friendly. The theory lesson helped me enormously for the exam. Top driving school in Leuven!

services.headline: Everything for your license
services.subtitle: From theory to practice — we guide you through every part of your driving education.

items.title: Theory Lessons
items.description: Interactive theory lessons that fully prepare you for the theoretical traffic exam. Learn traffic rules in a clear and accessible way.

items.title: Driving Lessons
items.description: Get behind the wheel of a modern Audi with an experienced instructor beside you. We teach you to drive on real Leuven roads.

items.title: Refresher Session
items.description: Already licensed but need a refresher? Our follow-up session helps you keep your driving skills sharp.

whyUs.headline: Not just a driving school
whyUs.subtitle: We set the standard for driving education in Leuven. Here's why our students choose us.

items.title: 97% pass rate
items.description: Our results speak for themselves. Almost all our students pass on their first attempt.

items.title: Short waiting times
items.description: Start driving quickly. No months of waiting — we schedule lessons at your pace.

items.title: Modern Audi vehicles
items.description: Drive in comfort and safety. Our fleet consists of recent Audi models with dual controls.

items.title: Near Leuven station
items.description: Centrally located within walking distance of the station. Easily accessible by tram, bus or train.

items.title: Personal coaching
items.description: Every student gets a dedicated instructor. We build trust and go at your own pace.

items.title: Certified instructors
items.description: All our instructors are officially recognized by the Flemish Department of Mobility and Public Works.

pricing.headline: Transparent. Fair. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the package that suits your situation. Every formula includes theory education.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Ideal if you already have some driving experience or want to get started quickly.

plans.name: Popular
plans.description: Our bestseller. Suitable for most beginners who want to drive comfortably.

plans.name: Intensive
plans.description: For those who want to pass quickly with maximum preparation and support.

pricing.note: All prices include VAT. Exam fees are not included. Ask about our installment payment options.
pricing.customText: We also create custom offers. Contact us for a personal consultation.

booking.headline: Ready to start?
booking.subtitle: Fill in the form and we will contact you within 24 hours to discuss everything.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us something about yourself or ask a question...
form.successText: We will contact you within 24 hours. See you soon!
form.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.

footer.description: Rijschool Lovanium guides young people in Leuven and surroundings to their driver's license. Professional, personal and with a proven approach.
footer.vat: VAT BE 0000.000.000 · Recognized by VMO Flanders
